---
title: "Make a Plot"
---

```{python}
import polars as pl
import plotnine_polars

gapminder = pl.read_csv(
    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jennybc/gapminder/main/inst/extdata/gapminder.tsv",
    separator="\t"
)

gapminder.head()
```

```{python}
p = gapminder.ggplot()
```

```{python}
p = (
    gapminder
    .ggplot()
    .aes(x = "gdpPercap", y = "lifeExp")
)
```

```{python}
p
```

```{python}
p.geom_point()
```

```{python}
(
    gapminder
    .ggplot()
    .aes(x = "gdpPercap",y = "lifeExp")
    .geom_smooth(method="loess")
)
```

```{python}
from plotnine.data import mpg

p = (
    gapminder
    .ggplot()
    .aes(x = "gdpPercap", y = "lifeExp")
    .geom_point()
    .geom_smooth(method="loess")
)
```

```{python}
p = (
    gapminder
    .ggplot()
    .aes(x = "gdpPercap", y = "lifeExp")
)

p.geom_point().geom_smooth(method = "lm")
```

```{python}
(
    gapminder
    .ggplot()
    .aes(x = "gdpPercap", y = "lifeExp")
    .geom_point()
    .geom_smooth(method = "loess", colour="blue")
    .scale_x_log10()
)
```

```{python}
from mizani.formatters import currency_format

(
    gapminder
    .ggplot()
    .aes(x = "gdpPercap", y = "lifeExp")
    .geom_point()
    .geom_smooth(method = "loess")
    .scale_x_log10(labels = currency_format(precision=0, big_mark=','))
)
```

```{python}
(
    gapminder
    .ggplot()
    .aes(x = "gdpPercap",
         y = "lifeExp",
         color = '"purple"')
    .geom_point()
    .geom_smooth(method = "loess")
    .scale_x_log10()
)
```

```{python}
(
    gapminder
    .ggplot()
    .aes(x = "gdpPercap", y = "lifeExp")
    .geom_point(color = "purple")
    .geom_smooth(method = "loess")
    .scale_x_log10()
)
```

```{python}
(
    gapminder
    .ggplot()
    .aes(x = "gdpPercap", y = "lifeExp")
    .geom_point(alpha = 0.3)
    .geom_smooth(color = "firebrick", se = False,
                 size = 8,  # not linewidth
                 method = "lm")
    .scale_x_log10()
)
```

```{python}
(
    gapminder
    .ggplot()
    .aes(x = "gdpPercap", y = "lifeExp")
    .geom_point(alpha = 0.3)
    .geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = False)
    .scale_x_log10(labels = currency_format(precision=0, big_mark=','))
    .labs(x = "GDP Per Capita", y = "Life Expectancy in Years",
          title = "Economic Growth and Life Expectancy",
          subtitle = "Data points are country-years",
          caption = "Source: Gapminder.")
)
```

```{python}
(
    gapminder
    .ggplot()
    .aes(x = "gdpPercap", y = "lifeExp", color="continent")
    .geom_point()
    .geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = False)
    .scale_x_log10()
)
```

```{python}
(
    gapminder
    .ggplot()
    .aes(x = "gdpPercap", y = "lifeExp", color="continent",
         fill="continent")
    .geom_point()
    .geom_smooth(method = "loess")
    .scale_x_log10()
)
```

```{python}
from plotnine_polars import aes

(
    gapminder
    .ggplot(aes(x = "gdpPercap", y = "lifeExp"))
    .geom_point(aes(color = "continent"))
    .geom_smooth(method = "loess")
    .scale_x_log10()
)
```

```{python}
import numpy as np
```

```{python}
(
    gapminder
    .with_columns(log_pop=pl.col("pop").log())
    .ggplot()
    .aes(x = "gdpPercap", y = "lifeExp", color="log_pop")
    .geom_point()
    .scale_x_log10()
)
```

```{python}
p_out = (
    gapminder
    .ggplot()
    .aes(x="gdpPercap", y="lifeExp")
    .geom_point()
    .geom_smooth(method = "loess")
    .scale_x_log10()
)
```

```{python}
#| warning: false
p_out.save("lifexp_vs_gdp_gradient.pdf", 
           height=8, width=10, units="in")
```


```{python}
mpg = pl.from_pandas(mpg)
```

```{python}
(
    mpg
    .ggplot()
    .aes(x="displ", y="hwy")
    .geom_point()
    .geom_smooth(method="loess")
    .labs(x="displacement", y="horsepower")
)
```
